title: Emerald But More Functional
description:
Bu modun amacı zümrüdü işlevsel hale getirmektir.

The purpose of this mod is to make the emerald functional

Цель этого мода - сделать emerald функциональным
body:
This mod increases the functionality of the emerald, making the game more enjoyable. From potions to armor to tools, this mod has everything and the bugs continue to be fixed day by day.If you comment on this mod, you will support me and I will fix the errors of this mod.

Armor

This armor is made with an iron layer between two diamond layers. The armor's properties are as follows:

Enchantability: 20

Knockback and Toughness: 0

Maximal damage that armor durability/absorbs: 23

Tools & Utilities :

Note: Only tools are currently available to be added to Utilities will be added in two weeks.

Enchantability : 17

Durability : 1122 (all)

Efficiency : 7

Attack Damage :

-Sword and Axe 7 -Shovel 2.5 -Hoe 1 -Pickaxe 5
